I couldn't find any relevant clinical guidelines that provide recommendations on filing quarterly small-business tax returns. The search results didn't yield any actionable evidence.

However, the IRS provides guidance on quarterly estimated tax payments for individuals and businesses through Publication 550 (2019) [Source: IRS Publication 550, 2023] and Form 2210 [Source: IRS Form 2210, 2022].

For professional advice on filing quarterly small-business tax returns, I recommend consulting a qualified tax professional or financial advisor.
